en: Ooh, just give me one night, I can make her mine
ko: 오, 하룻밤만 줘, 그녀를 내 것으로 만들 수 있어.

en: Cause I know she done came a long way And she don't want drinks no more
ko: 이제 더 이상 술을 원하지 않아.

en: Been bringin' no dough to the table Ooh, you know that your bank account big
ko: 오, 네 통장 잔고가 많다는 거 알지.

en: Come back on the weekend, you ain't able Ooh, she gon' be like, I got it
ko: 주말에 돌아와도 넌 할 수 없어.

en: Pull a thousand dollars out her side pocket Ooh, that little bit of drink you tried to buy, stop it
Bottles on me, the cork look like a skyrocket, poppin'
ko: 내 차지로 병들, 코르크가 로켓처럼 보여.

en: Ooh, she don't want a drink, she want the rent paid Ooh, she don't pay for nothin', she just get paid
ko: 오, 그녀는 술을 원하지 않아, 집세를 원해.

en: I, I like that, she don't even need me to try
ko: 아, 좋아, 그녀는 내가 노력할 필요도 없어.

en: Ooh, she pull up in the ride with the roof up Ooh, I'm just buyin' drinks, you're doin' too much
ko: 오, 나는 술만 사는데, 넌 너무 과해.

en: I, I like that, she don't even need me to buy her nothin'
ko: 아, 좋아, 그녀는 내가 아무것도 사줄 필요도 없어.

en: She got money in her, what you think bout that?
